An Unfinished Life (2005)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $8,535,575Details
International Box Office $10,000,000
Worldwide Box Office $18,535,575
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $21,742,068
Total $21,742,068
Further financial details...

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$1,008,308 (11.8% of total gross)
Legs:4.16 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:46.0% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$30,000,000 (worldwide box office is 0.6 times production budget)
Theater counts:139 opening theaters/888 max. theaters, 3.6 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $15,925,972

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: September 9th, 2005 (Limited) by Miramax
Video Release: April 11th, 2006 by Miramax Video
MPA Rating: PG-13 for some violence including domestic abuse, and language.
Running Time: 108 minutes
Plot point: Addiction, Animals Gone Bad, Death of a Son or Daughter, Death of a Spouse or Fiancée / Fiancé
Subgenre: Family Drama
Source:Original Screenplay
Genre:Drama
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction
Production Countries: United States, Germany
Languages: English
